subject: [PATCH 07/19] nfsd: add filehandle match check to nfsd4_delegreturn()

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a filehandle match check to the nfsd4_delegreturn() function in the NFSv4 state machine. The function previously did not verify that the delegation's file matches the current file handle, allowing a client to potentially destroy the correct delegation and wake up the wrong inode's waiters. The patch introduces an additional call to nfs4_check_fh() after generation check to ensure filehandle matching.
